gaps: No existing test case covers Transparency Mode sub-setting persistence across app close/reopen cycles.
No test case validates that the Environment sub-setting value (Surround slider) persists after switching to Speech and back, following an app kill/relaunch.
No test case covers the specific lifecycle sequence: set Environment → close app → reopen → switch to Speech → close app → reopen → verify Speech is still selected.
No test case validates Transparency Mode sub-setting persistence across app background/foreground transitions (Home button press and return).
No test case covers device-specific behavior differences between Voyager Surround 80 UC, Free 60+ UC, and Free 20 for Transparency Mode sub-setting persistence.
No test case validates that the slider values (Surround level 0-100 for Environment, Free level 0-100 for Speech) persist when switching between sub-settings after app restart.
No test case covers the state trigger timing: whether the sub-setting is saved on tab switch, on screen exit, or on API sync — the bug shows it's NOT saved on screen exit/app close.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-001: Environment Surround slider persistence across app close/reopen (Voyager Surround 80 UC)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Observe current sub-setting and Surround level
generated_testcases.expected: Environment sub-setting is selected. Surround level shows 85. 🧠 Bug Signature: If bug present, Transparency Mode defaults to Environment with Surround=50 (default), losing the persisted 85 value.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-002: Speech Free slider persistence across app close/reopen (Free 60+ UC)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
generated_testcases.expected: Speech sub-setting is selected. Free level shows 70. 🧠 Bug Signature: If bug present, Speech sub-setting resets to Free=50 (default) after app restart.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-003: Cross-sub-setting persistence after app kill/relaunch (Free 20)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
generated_testcases.expected: Environment sub-setting shows Surround level = 25. 🧠 Bug Signature: If bug present, switching to Speech and back resets Environment Surround to default (50), losing the persisted 25 value.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-004: Deep lifecycle — set Environment → kill → reopen → switch to Speech → kill → reopen → verify Speech (Voyager Surround 80 UC)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Observe which sub-setting is active and its value
generated_testcases.expected: Speech sub-setting is selected. Free level shows 60. 🧠 Bug Signature: If bug present, after second reopen the app defaults to Environment sub-setting with Surround=50, losing both the Speech selection and the Free=60 value.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-005: Immediate state trigger — set value and kill app without navigating away (Free 60+ UC)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
IMMEDIATELY close app (kill from recents) — do NOT switch tabs or navigate away
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Observe current sub-setting and Surround level
generated_testcases.expected: Environment sub-setting is selected. Surround level shows 95. 🧠 Bug Signature: If bug present, the value reverts to default (50) because the sub-setting value was only saved on tab switch or screen exit, not on API sync — immediate kill exposes this timing gap.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-006: Immediate state trigger — set Speech value and kill app without navigating away (Free 20)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
IMMEDIATELY close app (kill from recents) — do NOT switch tabs or navigate away
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
generated_testcases.expected: Speech sub-setting shows Free level = 15. 🧠 Bug Signature: If bug present, Free level resets to default (50) because the value was not synced before app termination.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-007: App background/foreground — Environment value persists after Home button (Voyager Surround 80 UC)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Press Home button (app goes to background)
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
generated_testcases.expected: Environment sub-setting is selected. Surround level shows 75. 🧠 Bug Signature: If bug present, backgrounding the app causes the slider to reset to default (50) on return.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-008: App background/foreground — Speech value persists after Home button (Free 60+ UC)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Press Home button (app goes to background)
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
generated_testcases.expected: Speech sub-setting shows Free level = 35. 🧠 Bug Signature: If bug present, Free level resets to default (50) after background/foreground cycle.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-009: Device asymmetry — Environment value persistence across app restart on all three devices
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Repeat entire sequence on Free 60+ UC with Surround=80
Repeat entire sequence on Free 20 with Surround=80
Compare results across all three devices
generated_testcases.expected: All three devices show Environment sub-setting with Surround level = 80 after app restart. 🧠 Bug Signature: If device asymmetry exists, one or more devices (likely Free 20 or Free 60+) show default value (50) while others persist correctly.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-010: Device asymmetry — Speech value persistence across app restart on all three devices
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Repeat entire sequence on Free 60+ UC with Free=65
Repeat entire sequence on Free 20 with Free=65
Compare results across all three devices
generated_testcases.expected: All three devices show Speech sub-setting with Free level = 65 after app restart. 🧠 Bug Signature: If device asymmetry exists, one or more devices show default Free level (50) while others persist correctly.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-011: Extreme slider values — Surround=0 and Free=100 persistence across sub-setting switch and app restart (Free 60+ UC)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Switch to Environment, observe Surround level
Switch to Speech, observe Free level
generated_testcases.expected: Before restart: Environment Surround=0, Speech Free=100. After restart: Environment Surround=0, Speech Free=100. 🧠 Bug Signature: If bug present, extreme boundary values (0 or 100) revert to default (50) after sub-setting switch or app restart.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-012: Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect — Transparency sub-setting values persist (Voyager Surround 80 UC)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Wait for app to reconnect (auto-connect or manual tap)
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Switch to Environment, observe Surround level
Switch to Speech, observe Free level
generated_testcases.expected: Environment Surround=60, Speech Free=40 after Bluetooth reconnect. 🧠 Bug Signature: If bug present, Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect triggers a full state sync that overwrites custom values with defaults.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-013: Rapid sub-setting switching — values persist after rapid toggling (Free 20)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Rapidly switch between Environment and Speech 10 times (tap each tab quickly)
generated_testcases.expected: Environment Surround=30, Speech Free=80 after rapid toggling. 🧠 Bug Signature: If bug present, rapid switching causes one or both values to reset to default due to race conditions in the UI state management.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-014: Phone reboot — Transparency sub-setting values persist after device restart (Free 60+ UC)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
After phone restarts, open Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Switch to Environment, observe Surround level
Switch to Speech, observe Free level
generated_testcases.expected: Environment Surround=55, Speech Free=45 after phone reboot. 🧠 Bug Signature: If bug present, phone reboot clears in-memory state and values revert to defaults (50) because they were never persisted to device or local storage.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TM-015: Sub-setting tab visual indicator — active tab matches persisted state after app restart (Voyager Surround 80 UC)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode
Observe which tab is visually highlighted/active
generated_testcases.expected: Speech tab is visually highlighted as active. Free level shows 88. 🧠 Bug Signature: If bug present, the Environment tab is highlighted (default) and slider shows Surround=50, indicating the active sub-setting state was not persisted, only the slider value.
